prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约12264→12262→12970→17058→24667，呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024–2025年加速下滑，近两年累计后移约7600名；2025年 基准约24667名；2021–2024年理科计划均为27人，2025年（物理类）计划大幅增至62人，2026年计划进一步增至82人，较2025年扩招约32.3%，竞争显著 加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中国大学排名第101名，近年排名在90–104名之间波动，属中上游211层次；2023年 高考周期内出现偏负面声誉事件（师德师风相关），抖音热度排名第84位（一般），未见明显投档断档记录，整体报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估数据中未收 录安徽大学，无法获取A类学科信息。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年山西省物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，变化幅度较小；计算机类、电 子信息/通信等热门工科专业社会热度持续高热，对安徽大学相关专业报考有一定拉动作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招约32.3%、物理类考生略减3.4%以及计算机类等热门专业热度持续等因素，扩招带来的竞争加剧效应占主导，预计最低位次进一步后移至约29391名，区间28891–29891 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 12264 → 12262 → 12970 → 17058 → 24667, showing a continuous backward trend, especially accelerating decline in 2024–2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7600 places in the last two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 24667; from 2021 to 2024, the science plan was 27 students each year, but in 2025 (Physics Category) the plan significantly increased to 62 students, and in 2026 the plan further increased to 82 students, an expansion of about 32.3% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in 2026, it ranked 101st in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, fluctuating between 90 and 104 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative reputation incident (related to teacher ethics), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 84th (average), no obvious record of enrollment gaps, and overall application attention was stable; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data did not include Anhui University, so information on A-level disciplines is unavailable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, a relatively small change; popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high social heat, which has a certain pulling effect on applications for related majors at Anhui University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of about 32.3% in 2026, a slight decrease of 3.4% in Physics Category candidates, and the sustained popularity of majors like Computer Science, the intensified competition effect from expansion dominates, and the minimum ranking is expected to further shift backward to about 29391, with a range of 28891–29891.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 1840 → 1845 → 7529 → 2657 → 4245. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (7529th place), rebounding to 2657th in 2024, and rising again to 4245th in 2025. The past two years have seen large fluctuations, with an overall backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, the Liberal Arts plan was 21–24 students; in 2025 (History Category), the plan increased to 39 students, and the 2026 plan remains at 39 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effects.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In 2026, it ranked 101st in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, fluctuating between 90th and 104th in recent years, placing it in the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there were somewhat negative reputation events (related to teacher ethics and conduct). Its Douyin popularity ranking was 84th (average), with no obvious admission gaps observed, and overall application attention remained stable. The fifth round of discipline evaluation data did not include Anhui University, so information on A-level disciplines is unavailable.
